tasks.label: Run Bundler
tasks.command: file=$(osascript -e 'POSIX path of (choose file)'); filename=$(basename "$file" .jsx); bundled_filename="${filename}_Bundled.jsx"; node "${workspaceFolder}/bundler.js" "$file"; read -p 'Would you like to add the bundled script to the ScriptUI folder? (y/n): ' answer; if [[ "$answer" == 'y' || "$answer" == 'Y' ]]; then dest=$(osascript -e 'POSIX path of (choose folder)'); cp "${workspaceFolder}/dist/$bundled_filename" "$dest/"; echo 'Copied the bundled script to the selected folder.'; else echo 'Skipped copying the bundled script.'; fi
